overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City at dusk. The player character moves from a street beneath an elevated neon-lit highway, past a burger restaurant and hotel, to a gas station area, surrounded by dystopian industrial architecture and holographic billboards.

events.description: dark sedan drives past on the street crossing the intersection ahead
slowing down to stop at the upcoming crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the industrial street beneath the elevated highway, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: sedan driving along the road and crossing the intersection

entered.detail: tall cylindrical industrial tower with illuminated 06 signage near the top
overhead highway structure with glowing cyan neon lights along its length
large factory-like structures with smoke stacks emitting orange smoke

segments.scene_description: Walking along an industrial city street at dusk beneath an elevated highway with cyan neon lights. The massive Tower 06 dominates the right side of the view while industrial smokestacks rise in the distance. A car passes by as the camera approaches an intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial intersection with fast food restaurant

events.description: stopping at the crosswalk to wait for vehicles to pass
entering the commercial sidewalk area with the burger restaurant
crossing the street and stepping onto the opposite sidewalk

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk for traffic to clear, then crossing toward the burger restaurant

notable_agents.action: person in colorful jacket standing near the burger restaurant entrance
car stopped at the intersection waiting for pedestrians

entered.detail: green building with large glowing burger sign and yellow outdoor umbrellas
zebra-striped pedestrian crossing on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: Stopped at a crosswalk in front of a burger restaurant with a glowing neon sign. After waiting for cars to pass, the camera crosses the street and approaches the restaurant entrance, passing under an archway. Pedestrians are visible near the storefront.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with hotel and outdoor dining

events.description: moving from commercial storefront into open plaza area
passing the illuminated hotel neon sign and entering the parking plaza

agents.ego_description: walking through the urban plaza past outdoor seating and toward the hotel and parking structure

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt walking across the plaza ahead

entered.detail: large pink neon sign reading HOTEL on the side of a building
multi-level concrete parking structure with yellow safety markings
yellow umbrellas and tables outside the restaurant

segments.scene_description: Walking through an open concrete plaza past outdoor dining tables with yellow umbrellas. A prominent pink neon hotel sign glows on the left while a multi-story parking garage stands on the right. The area is sparsely populated with a few pedestrians crossing the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: gas station and parking plaza with billboards

events.description: approaching the illuminated gas station with digital price signs
turning to view the gas station price board and surrounding billboards

agents.ego_description: walking around the gas station area, observing the neon price signs and surrounding cityscape

notable_agents.action: two people walking near the gas station pumps

entered.detail: fuel station with illuminated canopy and multiple pumps
tall digital display showing fuel prices in red and blue neon

segments.scene_description: Approaching a gas station with a tall digital price sign displaying fuel costs in bright neon. The camera moves around the station plaza, passing by parked cars and pedestrians. Tower 06 reappears in the distance on the right, while large holographic billboards illuminate the background buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dystopian city street at dusk, moving from the shadow of an elevated highway toward a brightly lit commercial plaza. It begins beneath a highway glowing with cyan neon lights, passing the massive Tower 06 and distant industrial smokestacks as a car glides by toward an intersection. As the camera reaches a crosswalk, the view shifts toward a burger restaurant with a glowing neon sign, moving under an archway and past pedestrians to enter an open concrete plaza. The scene then expands across a courtyard featuring yellow dining umbrellas and a prominent pink hotel sign, flanked by a multi-story parking garage. Finally, the camera approaches a gas station dominated by a tall digital price sign, circling the plaza past parked cars while holographic billboards and the distant silhouette of Tower 06 illuminate the urban horizon.
